parameters.text: ={{ String(($('[Exec Intake] Montar Evento demanda.criada').first()?.json?.text) || '(sem texto)').replace(/&/g, '&').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>') }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, demanda_id: $('[Exec Intake] Montar Evento demanda.criada').first().json.demanda_id, event: "demanda.criada" } }}
